title: OSHI NO KO Season 3 Releases Commemorative Visual, Trailer Featuring Aqua and Ruby
content: OSHI NO KO Season 3 released a commemorative visual and trailer which features the Hoshino twins, Aqua and Ruby, to celebrate the recently concluded season. Season 4 , which will conclude the anime series is currently in production. The first season premiered in March 2023 and swept our Spring 2023 seasonal rankings .
author: Anime Corner

title: Manta Adds Japanese Manga Titles to Its Platform
content: Webtoon platform Manta announced on Tuesday it has begun offering Japanese manga on its service, expanding beyond its existing catalog of webtoons and web novels. The platform said readers will now be able to access manga titles alongside its current content library.
author: ANN

title: MangaGamer Releases Rose Guns Days Game's 1st Season
content: MangaGamer released the first season of its new edition of 07th Expansion 's Rose Guns Days visual novel series on MangaGamer and Steam on Thursday. The release features updated graphics, as well as Japanese, English, and Chinese language options.
author: ANN

title: REMOW Reveals Streaming Platforms for Ichijōma Mankitsu Gurashi! Anime
content: The streaming platforms include: • Rakuten VIKI: United States, Guam, Canada, Brazil, Mexico, United Kingdom, Australia, New Zealand • OceanVeil: United States, Canada • It's Anime YouTube channel: Global (some territories may be restricted) • ADN: Europe The first episode will debut on April 12 on all the above…
author: ANN

title: Cardfight!! Vanguard Announces New TV Anime for 2027, New Theatrical Anime to End Divinez Saga
content: Cardfight!! Vanguard Announces New TV Anime for 2027, New Theatrical Anime to End Divinez Saga
author: ANN

title: 17 Years Later, Classic Original Anime Gets a New Adaptation
content: Eden of the East by Production I.G. is one of the most acclaimed original anime series of all time. The anime debuted in 2009 and released 11 episodes as a side story. Following the series’ success, the studio released several movies, and the story was even adapted into a light novel by Kenji Kamiyama.
author: ComicBook

title: Netflix’s One Piece Live-Action Confirms Major Character in Alabasta After a Disappointing Season 2
content: Warning: This article contains spoilers from the One Piece manga! It’s been a month since the exciting Season 2 of Netflix’s One Piece live-action was released and the series again received countless praises from fans and critics alike.
author: ComicBook

title: Crunchyroll’s Major Shonen Jump Anime Has an Exciting Surprise Event For Fans After Finale
content: The exciting Spring 2026 anime lineup premieres Dr. Stone : Science Future Part 3 to wrap up the epic sci-fi series. The anime is based on the award-winning manga written by Riichiro Inagaki and illustrated by Boichi, which began serialization in Shueisha’s Weekly Shonen Jump magazine in 2017.
author: ComicBook

title: Netflix’s One Piece Live-Action Producers Confirm At Least 8 Seasons
content: It’s been a month since Netflix’s One Piece live-action Season 2 was released, and the hype around the series hasn’t died down at all. After making fans wait for more than two years, the sequel season follows the Straw Hat Pirates’ journey into the Grand Line, where they meet new allies and enemies.
author: ComicBook

title: Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End Star Shares Major Season 3 Concern: “How Will They Depict It?”
content: The latest Season 2 of Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End has finally reached its conclusion as the exciting journey of Frieren and her party continues after the First Class Mage Exam. The party travels to the Northern Plateau, where they keep encountering bigger threats than ever.
author: ComicBook
